posts.author: Jean (D)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I am looking for an expert to develop an application on monday.
This person must speak French.
/
Je recherche un expert pour développer une application sur monday.
Cette personne doit impérativement parler français.

Thanks,
Jeans

posts.author: aquibk (Aquib Zafar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Jean ,

Though I am not a french speaker but I can certainly help you in developing the application.

Best Regards,
Aquib
